title: psyllium strictum
intro: Psyllium strictum, also known as one-seeded psyllium or plantago stricta, is a type of plant that belongs to the plantago family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Psyllium strictum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve constipation, and lower cholesterol levels, making it a popular natural remedy for gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Psyllium strictum can be found in capsule or powder form, often used to support digestive health and promote regular bowel movements.
